title: Resource Bin Packing — Tuning the score function
text:
shape
is used to specify the behavior of the
RequestedToCapacityRatio
function.
shape
:
-
utilization
:
0
score
:
0
-
utilization
:
100
score
:
10
The above arguments give the node a
score
of 0 if
utilization
is 0% and 10 for
utilization
100%, thus enabling bin packing behavior. To enable least
requested the score value must be reversed as follows.
shape
:
-
utilization
:
0
score
:
10
-
utilization
:
100
score
:
0
resources
is an optional parameter which defaults to:
resources
:
-
name
:
cpu
weight
:
1
-
name
:
memory
weight
:
1
It can be used to add extended resources as follows:
resources
:
-
name
:
intel.com/foo
weight
:
5
-
name
:
cpu
weight
:
3
-
name
:
memory
weight
:
1
The
weight
parameter is optional and is set to 1 if not specified. Also, the
weight
cannot be set to a negative value.
